title: Oil gains after an unexpected fall in US inventories
section_path: Oil gains after an unexpected fall in US inventories
section_path_text: Oil gains after an unexpected fall in US inventories
summary:
Main
A risk-off tone across markets weighed on sentiment. A stronger USD led to lower interest from investors. Falling inventories provided support to oil.
